approvalSource: Steve approved the tightened Foundation-only sprint: one card at a time, endpoint metric rows must disappear or be proven current, no classification-around-it, no Value Builder split.
scopeSummary: Refresh latest endpoint metrics, prove endpoint System Health rows are gone/current, repair the stale endpoint-budget proof delegation path, and close the active Current Sprint card.
constraints: Foundation-only today; no Value Builder, no source/value/agent feature work, and no parallel split.
Use the existing live sprint unless Current Sprint truth is explicitly updated by the focused proof.
Run one card at a time; no bundling except tiny support fixes required by this card proof.
Endpoint metrics exit means the five endpoint metric System Health rows disappear or are proven current, not classified.
Do not rewrite endpoint thresholds, route implementations, or lazy-loading behavior unless the focused proof shows a measured route is over budget.
No Drive permission mutation, email sends, Agent Feedback sends, external writes, broad extraction, or provider probes.
